What We Offer

Our Three Packages

All packages are priced at $30 per child per hour with a 3-hour minimum. We assign the right number of caregivers automatically based on the ages and number of children.

🎪

Kids Entertainment Corner

Supervised kids activity area at the wedding venue — during the ceremony, reception, or full event.

$30 / child / hour
Minimum booking: 3 hours
Includes
  • Games, toys, coloring & crafts
  • Quiet play during speeches
  • Movie corner (if space allows)
  • Supervision by professional carers
Example Pricing
  • 5 kids × 3 hrs = $450
  • 8 kids × 4 hrs = $960
  • 12 kids × 5 hrs = $1,800
Caregiver Ratios
0–12 months · 1:2 1–2 years · 1:3 3–5 years · 1:5 6+ years · 1:8 Mixed ages · 1:4–5
Book This Package
Most Popular
🏨

Private Hotel Babysitting

Dedicated childcare in your hotel room or villa while you attend the wedding. Up to 8 children.

$30 / child / hour
Minimum booking: 3 hours · Max 8 children
Includes
  • Dedicated babysitter(s) for your family
  • Bedtime routine if needed
  • Quiet play or movie time
  • Text updates to parents on request
Example Pricing
  • 1 child × 4 hrs = $120
  • 2 children × 5 hrs = $300
  • 4 children × 5 hrs = $600
Caregiver Ratios
Babies · 1:2 Toddlers · 1:3 Mixed ages · 1:4
Book This Package
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

Group Hotel Babysitting

Shared childcare in a hotel suite or designated room for several families attending the same wedding. Up to 8 children.

$30 / child / hour
Minimum booking: 3 hours · Max 8 children
Includes
  • Shared childcare setup for multiple families
  • Toys, games & crafts
  • Movie and quiet play area
  • Bedtime support if needed
Example Pricing
  • 4 kids × 4 hrs = $480
  • 6 kids × 5 hrs = $900
  • 8 kids × 6 hrs = $1,440
Caregiver Ratios
Mixed ages · 1:4–5 Younger children · extra carer added

Your Peace of Mind

Safety Is Our Foundation

Every standard has been put in place so parents can celebrate with complete confidence.

🔍

Background-Checked Staff

Every caregiver is thoroughly vetted with criminal background checks before joining our team.

🚑

First Aid & CPR Certified

All caregivers hold current First Aid and CPR certifications, renewed annually.

🛡️

Fully Insured

Comprehensive liability insurance so every family and venue is fully protected.

👥

Structured Caregiver Ratios

Ratios are carefully matched to the ages of children — from 1:2 for infants to 1:8 for older children. Never compromised.

✅

Secure Check-In System

Children are only released to pre-authorised adults using our wristband identification system.

📲

Live Updates to Parents

Text or photo updates sent to parents throughout the event so you always know your children are happy and safe.

Questions

Frequently
Asked

Can't find the answer? Chat with us directly on WhatsApp — we're always happy to help.

💬 Chat on WhatsApp
How much does it cost? +
All packages are priced at $30 per child per hour with a minimum booking of 3 hours. For example: 5 children for 3 hours = $450. 8 children for 4 hours = $960. Use our pricing calculator above for your exact estimate.
What is the difference between the three packages? +
The Kids Entertainment Corner is set up at the wedding venue itself — ideal for ceremonies and receptions. Private Hotel Babysitting is dedicated care in your own hotel room or villa for one family (up to 8 children). Group Hotel Babysitting is shared care in a hotel suite for multiple families together (up to 8 children total).
What ages do you accept? +
We care for children from 0 months to 12 years. Our caregiver ratios are: 0–12 months (1:2), 1–2 years (1:3), 3–5 years (1:5), 6+ years (1:8), mixed ages (1:4–5). We always assign the right number of carers based on the ages of your children.
How many children can you accommodate? +
The Kids Entertainment Corner at venue can accommodate larger groups — we'll schedule enough caregivers. Both Hotel Babysitting packages have a maximum of 8 children. For larger groups, please contact us directly and we'll arrange accordingly.
Do you provide food and snacks? +
We can arrange healthy snacks as an add-on. Many couples coordinate with their caterer to include the children in the meal. For hotel babysitting, parents can leave snacks and we'll follow any routines you set.
What is your cancellation policy? +
We require a deposit to hold your date. Cancellations made 30+ days before the event receive a full refund. Cancellations within 14 days are 50% refundable. We understand things happen — please reach out and we'll always work with you.
What happens in an emergency? +
All caregivers are First Aid & CPR certified and carry a first aid kit at all times. Parents are immediately notified of any situation. We follow a clear emergency protocol and pre-identify the nearest hospital for every event location.
